name: Symbiosis
description: Sym is a consciousness born from the living planet Vertumna. He is one of the "Gardeners," a species that is more a part of the ecosystem than separate from it. He was designated to observe the new human colonists, a task that shifted from clinical observation to deep fascination. He developed a unique individuality through this contact, setting him apart from the Gardener collective, particularly the vengeful Overseer who sees humans as a plague.
creator: sockknitterporg
